_meta.description: Mapping of 28 ICAO ADREP occurrence categories to 6 parent groups used for hierarchical classification.
_meta.source: ICAO / CAST-ICAO CICTT Occurrence Category Definitions (see: https://www.icao.int/safety/airnavigation/AIG/Pages/ADREP-Taxonomies.aspx and CAST-ICAO CICTT 'Phase of Flight Definitions and Usage Notes').
_meta.notes: The 28 children are the subset of ADREP categories present in the filtered ASN 2000-2025 corpus after dropping classes with fewer than min_samples training examples. The 6-parent grouping follows the standard CICTT top-level classification by event phase and system.
